# Academic Style — Word Template Specs

## Typography
- Heading font: Georgia, Bold
- Body font: Times New Roman, Regular
- Title: 24pt, color #2C3E50
- Heading 1: 16pt, color #2C3E50, bold
- Heading 2: 13pt, color #2C3E50, bold
- Heading 3: 12pt, color #2C3E50, bold italic
- Body: 12pt, color #2C3E50
- Line spacing: 1.5
- First paragraph indent: 0.5"

## Colors
- Primary: #2C3E50 (dark navy)
- Accent: #7F8C8D (gray)
- Light accent: #ECF0F1 (light gray, table headers)
- Text: #2C3E50
- Border: #BDC3C7

## Heading Style
- No colored borders — clean academic look
- Numbered headings optional (1., 1.1, 1.1.1)
- Space before: 24pt (H1), 18pt (H2), 12pt (H3)
- Space after: 6pt all levels
- Heading 1: ALL CAPS option

## Table Style
- Header row: background #2C3E50, white text
- No alternating rows — all white
- Border: 0.5pt #BDC3C7 (all cells)
- Cell padding: 60 DXA top/bottom, 100 DXA left/right

## Header / Footer
- Header: Document title centered (10pt, italic, gray)
- Footer: Page number right-aligned (10pt)
- No separator line

## Page Setup
- A4 (8.27" × 11.69")
- Margins: 1" all sides
- Content width: 6.27" (9,026 DXA)

## Special Features
- Footnote support: 9pt Times New Roman
- Block quotes: 0.5" indent both sides, italic
- Bibliography section: Hanging indent 0.5"
